ui.style: clean, modern, highly legible for interfaces

primary.name: Cocoa
primary.usage: Primary buttons, heavy text, dominant brand accents.

background.name: Cream
background.usage: Main app background. Never pure white. A warm, appetizing base.

highlight.name: Subtle Gold
highlight.usage: Bestseller badges, star ratings, premium accents.

card.usage: White cards on the cream background to create soft contrast.

visual_enhancers.corners: Rounded-2xl (`rounded-2xl`) for product cards, images, and buttons to feel soft and welcoming.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft ambient shadows. Use `shadow-lg` or a custom `shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(59,36,22,0.08)]` to make elements float.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px subtle border on cards (`border-orange-900/10`) to provide crisp edges over soft shadows.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky cart FAB and slide-in cart drawer. Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40`.

layouts.general: Mobile-first approach. Generous whitespace (`p-6` or `p-8`). Never center-align paragraphs.
layouts.hero_section: Cinematic hero with tagline 'Bake. Love. Repeat.' Use image overlay (max `bg-black/40`) to maintain image visibility while ensuring text contrast. Ensure 'Playfair Display' is used for the H1 in `text-5xl md:text-6xl`.
layouts.menu_grid: Bento-style or neat multi-column grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 md:gap-8`). Overlap badges gracefully.
layouts.admin_dashboard: High-density grid. Kanban board needs a horizontal scrolling area (`flex overflow-x-auto gap-6`) for order statuses (New → Baking → Packed → Out for Delivery → Delivered). Use compact cards for orders.
layouts.checkout_flow: Step-by-step or clear vertical form with Shadcn components. Include UPI QR code inside a neat card.

components.hero: HTML/Tailwind custom section with overlapping text. No Shadcn here.
components.product_card: Custom card using `rounded-2xl`, image on top, badges (Bestseller, New, Eggless) positioned absolute. Quantity stepper and Add to Cart button.
components.cart_fab: Sticky FAB (`fixed bottom-6 right-6`), rounded-full, glassmorphism, with a live count badge.
components.cart_drawer: Shadcn `Sheet` component for slide-in from right.
components.kanban_board: Custom flex-col columns for each state, draggable (use HTML5 drag/drop or basic state-driven lists).
components.kpi_strip: Grid of 3-4 Shadcn Cards at the top of admin.

motion.hover: Smooth scale up on product cards (`hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300`).
motion.interactions: Hover states MUST explicitly change background and text color.
motion.toast: Use Sonner for all notifications (Added to cart, Order placed, Status updated).
motion.drawer: Smooth slide in for the cart drawer.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility.keyboard: All modals, dialogs, and the cart drawer must support `ESC` to close and focus trapping.
accessibility.aria: ARIA labels required on all icon buttons (e.g., FAB, Quantity +/-, Close icons).

hero_image.description: Bundt chocolate cake - cinematic and moody. Used for the Hero background.

brownie.description: High-angle shot of chocolate brownies on a ceramic plate.

cookie.description: Tasty chocolate chip cookies paired with fresh milk.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Playfair Display, Inter, Poppins.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette (Cocoa, Cream, Peach) and set Cream as the default body background.
Build the customer-facing e-commerce storefront with a cinematic hero, bento-style menu grid, and slide-in cart drawer using Shadcn Sheet.
Implement the 'Order Now' flow: Multi-step checkout or single long form, UPI QR display, and WhatsApp confirmation prompt.
Build the Admin Dashboard featuring a Kanban board for order management (New -> Baking -> Packed -> Out for Delivery -> Delivered).
For the Kanban board, use a horizontal scroll layout with distinct columns. Implement drag-and-drop if possible, or standard click-to-move buttons.
Ensure the hero image uses an overlay no darker than bg-black/40 for maximum visibility.
All components must be contained in .js files as specified.
Never center-align large blocks of text; left-align them for readability.
Do NOT apply 'transition: all' globally. Target specific properties.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy. Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur). You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). You MUST NOT center align the app container in App.css. Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or rounded-2xl). NEVER use AI assistant emojis. Every interaction needs micro-animations. Use generous spacing (2-3x normal). DO NOT use dark colors as gradients. Use Sonner for toasts.
